rows.label: tev020701_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Grette if anything is troubling her.

rows.label: tev020701_MSG0001
rows.name:
Have you ever picked any of the fruits
or flowers that grow here on Mira?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020701_MSG0002
rows.name:
Some of those collectibles were named by
the first BLADEs who discovered them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020701_MSG0003
rows.name:
I myself found a brilliant white feather
once, and gave it the name of "queen's
rapture." It was quite the thrilling experience![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020701_MSG0004
rows.name:
I hope my dear friend Fine can experience
that incredible feeling one day![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020701_MSG0008
rows.name:
Our team will be heading out
on an expedition shortly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020701_MSG0009
rows.name:
We'll set up a camp to use as a hub for a
long-term survey of the area, as well as
the extermination of dangerous indigens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020701_MSG0010
rows.name:
But I have no idea how I'm going to
maintain proper hygiene out there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020701_MSG0011
rows.name:
Perhaps I can convince my loyal
manservant Adelbert and his
assistant Dirk to install a shower.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020701_MSG0016
rows.name:
Indigens have been known to drop
precious items on occasion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020701_MSG0017
rows.name:
Those items can be sold for large amounts
of money, or used as materials for the
creation of powerful equipment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020701_MSG0018
rows.name:
Are you familiar with the monster known as a
Vasalt? The splendid horn it sometimes drops
is a famous example of a rare material.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020701_MSG0019
rows.name:
I've sold a lot of salvaged materials for a lot
of money, in hopes of one day opening a shop in
the commercial district with my friend, Fine.[ST:wait ]
